title: FightPlugin

body:
FightPlugin - Epic wars between cities!

Are you ready to enter the battle for domination of the world? With FightPlugin, your cities will become an arena for epic battles and strategic maneuvers! This plugin for Towny turns ordinary cities into hot spots of conflict where power and territories are threatened.

The FightPlugin system provides you with a unique opportunity to declare war on another city. To do this, both sides need to have at least 6 players online and disable neutrality in Towny. After a preparatory period of half an hour, PvP mode is activated, it is allowed to blow up and break blocks to the enemy.

The fight continues until one of the parties earns 100 points. For each murder you get 2 points, and for capturing a chunk - 3. The first side, who scores 100 points, receives half of the territories and half of the coins from the opponent's treasury. If one side wins a second time, it takes all territories and coins.

But be careful - during the war you can't use the commands /spawn, /hub, /home and others to avoid the live from the battle. In addition, in case of defeat, your city is deprived of all territories.

Immerse yourself in the world of endless struggle for power and glory with FightPlugin! Available only for servers with Towny.
